spec_summary: suma dos números enteros y retorna el resultado.

tasks.name: Implement sum function
tasks.description: Write a function sum(a,b) that returns the sum of two integers.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: The function sum correctly returns a + b for all integer inputs a and b.

tasks.name: Verify sum with example
tasks.description: Run sum(2,3) and check result equals 5.
